titleStmt.title: SII 15.67: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 67. (B.K. No. 55 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the roof of the Gaṇēśa shrine near the Girls' School

The inscription contains two dates. One is the fourth regnal year of the king, Viśvāvasu, Pushya śu. 2, Wednesday, corresponding to 1185 A.D., December 25. The other is Pushya śu. 8, Sunday in the same year. The tithi corresponds to 1185 A.D., December 31, the weekday being Tuesday.

On the first date are registered, among others, gifts made for the worship of the god in the Nōmpiya Basadi, and for burning a lamp before the deity Kammaṭēśvara at Lokkiguṇḍi. On the second date are recorded a series of donations made for the worship of the deity Śāntinātha in Kammaṭa-jinālaya by several members of the artisan community of the same place. The gifts were made in the presence of the One Thousand Mahājanas, all the Gōles and Gō-Brāhmaṇas of Lokkiguṇḍi which is said to be an agrahāra created by Śrī-Rāma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāsraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabha ṭṭāraka
satyāśraya kuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta rōtta
rābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire © svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya dhyā
nadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāna parāyaṇa japasamādhiśīlasaṁpannarssamastaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛtarvvidita
vēdārtthavidyāpāragarṣaṭkarmaniratarssaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitrīkṛta śarīrarcca
turvvēdapāragaraṣṭādaśadharmmaśāstrakuśaḷarēkavākyaracaḷitadhairyyarddhairyyaparākrama rāśri
tajanakalpavṛkṣarahitapakṣakṣayakararkkaliyugagāṁgēyarppara�ḷāhavadura
ndhararśāpānugrahasamarttharkkāryyabṛhaspatigaḷēkaikapaṁḍitarggrāmanāmōttamarvvai ṣṇavagīti
manōhararppāpabhīrugaḷparanārīdūrardduṣṭavidhvaṁsakarvviśiṣṭajanāśrayarkkāmakrō dhalōbha
mōhavivarjjitarddvātriṁsatsahasrasamayārghyārhardvi jakuḷatiḷakarśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁja rarssa
mastaguṇaviśēṣōnnatarappa śrī rāmaradattimahāgrahāra śrīmallokkiguṁḍiyūroḍeya pra
mukha mahājanaṁ śrī sāsirvvaruṁ samastagōle gōbrāhmaṇarmmodalāgi sabālavṛddha rnneredu dha
rmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadharmmadiṁ surakṣitamāge rakṣisuttamire . © vananidhiparivṛta vasudeyoḷa va
menaloppuvagrahāraṁ lakṣmīghanakucataṭāgrahāramidanikuṁ śrī lokkiguṁḍi mūṟuṁ jagadoḷ . ©
© śrīge vibhūtiṁge dharmmakkāgaramenaliṁdranaggadamarāvatigaṁ bhōgāvatigaṁ sale mēlā gippudu
dharege lokkiguṁḍigrāmaṁ . Iṁtenisidī grāmadoḷage © svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī viśvakarmma
nirmmitavāstuprāsādamaka ttra cchēdhacittacchēda gaṇa ®kōṭi mukhyābharaṇarmmaṇi
kanakaratnattrayar ghaṭāpa kakaṭisūtranigaḷakarṇnakuṇḍaḷakēyūrahāra kaṭa
makuṭaratnatraya karmmaka tiṣṭhādhikar bhṛkuṭisādhāraṇarllaṁkōddhṛtahēma kūṭa
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyacakravartti tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēśvaradēvavaruṣada 4 neya viśvāvasu saṁvatsarada puśya
śudda 2 budhavāraduttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdina puṇyatithiyoḷ Ūro
ḍaya pramukha śrī sannidhānadoḷ nōṁpiya basadiya dēvaraṣṭavidhārcca nege Accina
moḷeya kēṇikāṟa viṣṇu yciseṭṭiyaru biṭṭa ha 5 mattaṁ hannirvvaru Ajjiya
ka satvaguṇadalu varṣakke biṭṭa paṇa 1 mattaṁ seṭigaru kaṁmaṭēśvara sū
ḍareṇnege mūṟara dīvige ṇeya hannirvvaru naḍasuvaru . mattaṁ beḷḷigaṁmaṭadavaru Ajji
ya vastradānakkeṁdu saṁkramaṇadalu kammaṭakke biṭṭa paṇa 1 mattaṁ baḍagi kammāra
ru vokkalalondu horeyamaṁ hannasuṁ dhānyadalu baḷḷa vondumaṁ biṭṭaru . Intī dharmmamaṁ
nūṟippattu kottaḷigaḷu tamma dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisuva hāge pratipāḷisuvaru .
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyacakravartti tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēsvaradēvavarṣada 4 neya viśvāvasu saṁ
vatsarada puśya suddha Aṣṭami Ādityavāradaṁdu śrī rāmaradatti śrī lokkiguṁḍiya Ūroḍeya pra
mukha śrī sāsirvvara priyaputrarappa Asēsa kotaḷi mahimeyeṁteṁdaḍe . mattaṁ svasti śrī visvakarmma
nirmitavā māṭakūṭa sikharasikhara mānōnumānamahi� taru siva pāda sēkha raru A
catusameya sameAtigaḷu padineṇṭu yōgapīṭhapratiṣṭhitaruṁ liṁgastaṁ bha dvāra pra
taru patracitravicitrakuśaḷaru . paṁcāradiṁnavasanakapravīṇaru sa �vīra
yaṁtrayaṁtraprasidharumappa Asēsakotaḷigaḷu mukhyavāgi puṇyōdaya kēsavadē vara mādivōja dēvōja
ya �ṭada hiriya kētōja ruddhōja rāmōjanuṁ nāgīṁdra kēsavadēvara vōjayi tarū
vāri gaṇapōjanu . śrī sāntināthadēvara vōjayivaru sōvōja rāmōja kētōjana
kēsavadēvara sōvōja dāḷiseṭṭiya bammōja Ayiseṭṭiyara jinnōja Intu I
varu mukhyavāgi samasta Anādisaṁsiddhamappa śrī
kammaṭa jinālayada śrī śāṁtināthadēvarige Aṣṭavidhārccanege biṭṭaru koḍatige
hāga Oṁdu 1 vōjugaḷe hāga 2 mattaṁ . ruvārigaḷu pratumegaḷa māḍuva bele kaṭida
li honna baḷiya bēḷeya kuḍuvaru 2 . I dharmma taṁtamma dharmmavāgi svadharmmadi naḍa
sidavargge mahāpuṇya tīrtthagaḷa miṁda phalavaku . Ida naḍasadavargge paṁcama
hāpātakarakku .A few more letters are
Digital edition of SII 15.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
